compliance_requirements: Minimum 5 years of experience in Dynamics CRM development
Must be based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia (remote within KL region)
Open only to Malaysian citizens or expats currently based in Kuala Lumpur

must_have.requirement: Design and implementation of CRM solutions using Microsoft Dynamics 365 and Power Platform
evidence_signals: Led or delivered Dynamics 365 customization projects end-to-end
Experience with both Dynamics CRM and Power Platform components
Can articulate solution design decisions and tradeoffs
negative_signals: Only end-user experience with Dynamics 365, no development work
Cannot describe plugin architecture or solution design

must_have.requirement: Strong C# (.NET) development expertise for Dynamics CRM customization
evidence_signals: Shipped C# plugins or custom workflow activities for Dynamics 365
Demonstrates good .NET practices: typing, async, error handling, unit testing
Can explain CRM SDK and plugin execution pipeline
negative_signals: No C# experience or only basic scripting without production deployment
Cannot describe plugin registration, isolation mode, or deployment

must_have.requirement: JavaScript development for form customization and client-side scripting
evidence_signals: Written JavaScript form scripts for Dynamics 365 entity forms
Experience with Xrm.WebApi for client-side data operations
Can explain event handling, form customization patterns, and unsupported vs supported methods
negative_signals: No JavaScript experience in Dynamics 365 context
Cannot describe client-side vs server-side scripting tradeoffs

must_have.requirement: Hands-on experience with Dynamics CRM SDK including plugin and custom workflow development
evidence_signals: Registered and deployed plugins with pre/post-operation message steps
Built custom workflow activities and custom actions
Understands plugin execution context, security, and sandbox
negative_signals: Unfamiliar with plugin registration tool or managed/unmanaged solutions
Cannot explain early vs late binding or IOrganizationService usage

must_have.requirement: Experience with Dynamics 365 modules such as Sales, Customer Service, and Marketing
evidence_signals: Delivered customizations across multiple Dynamics 365 functional modules
Understands module-specific entities, business processes, and workflows
Can configure and customize module-specific OOB functionality
negative_signals: Experience limited to a single module with no cross-module understanding
Cannot describe how modules interact or share data

must_have.requirement: Integration of external systems using REST/Web APIs and troubleshooting performance issues
evidence_signals: Integrated Dynamics 365 with external systems via REST/OData Web API
Implemented error handling, retry logic, and authentication for integrations
Can diagnose and resolve performance bottlenecks in plugins or integrations
negative_signals: No experience integrating Dynamics 365 with external systems
Cannot describe API authentication patterns (OAuth, app registrations) for Dynamics 365

must_have.requirement: Customization of entities, forms, workflows, and reports to meet business requirements
evidence_signals: Customized entities with custom fields, relationships, and views in Dynamics 365
Created and modified workflows, business rules, and business process flows
Built or modified SSRS or FetchXML reports for Dynamics 365
negative_signals: Limited to out-of-the-box configuration without custom development
No experience with custom entity relationships, views, or advanced find

must_have.requirement: Strong communication skills, cross-team collaboration, and mentorship of junior developers
evidence_signals: Led technical discussions with business stakeholders and translated requirements to solutions
Mentored junior developers and conducted code reviews
Documented technical solutions for team knowledge sharing
negative_signals: No evidence of mentoring, technical leadership, or stakeholder communication
Works only in isolation without cross-team involvement

nice_to_have.skill: Experience in banking or financial services industry projects
Azure DevOps or CI/CD implementation for Dynamics 365 solutions
Microsoft Dynamics 365 or Power Platform certifications (MB-400, PL-400)
Exposure to Microsoft Copilot, AI-driven workflows, or agentic automation
Advanced Power Platform capabilities beyond core CRM customization

rating_scale.3: Strong; shipped in production with clear ownership
rating_scale.4: Expert; repeatable success, can mentor and set standards

bias_guardrails: Ignore protected attributes and non-job-relevant personal information.
Evaluate on demonstrated outcomes: shipped features, measurable improvements, reliability learnings.
Accept equivalent experience from open-source, freelance, internships, or non-traditional paths if production-like.
